title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Enhancements meet Cyberpunk Code Breach Visual Update
summary: Showcase the new AI assistant capabilities alongside the Code Breach cyberpunk redesign, highlighting real-time problem-solving help and immersive tower-defense visuals.
core_message: CodeGrind blends Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistance with a refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk experience, delivering guided problem solving in a dynamic coding game. Users get model-switching conversations, persistent chats, and enhanced in-game visuals that visualize programming concepts as defensive towers.
cta: Try the updated CodeGrind AI assistant now and explore the Code Breach redesign in action.
visual_brief: Static hero-style banner showing a code editor mockup on one side and a cyberpunk Code Breach tower-defense scene on the other, with glowing towers representing ForLoop, WhileLoop, and IfCondition, and an AI chat bubble overlay highlighting problem-solving guidance.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
